SEARCH
Package io.github.elevateddev.lattice.metrics

Class GraphMetrics

java.lang.Object
io.github.elevateddev.lattice.metrics.GraphMetrics
public final class GraphMetrics extends Object
Live metrics for one graph instance.

Counters are monotonic unless the method name describes state (overloaded(), startTime(), stopTime()). The stage and edge maps are immutable views of the graph topology; the metric objects inside those maps continue to update while the graph runs. Runtime update methods such as recordEmit() are exposed for the runtime implementation and should not be called by applications.
